heading.description: Short event or step label for the timeline item. The current v2 prompt asks for this field as the item title.

description.description: One specific explanatory sentence tied to the slide objective.
description.example: Researchers identify the core pattern and connect it to the lesson objective.

icon_name.description: Optional Remix Icon class accepted by the current v2 prompt schema.

items.heading: Initial Discovery
items.description: Researchers identify the core pattern and connect it to the lesson objective.

items.heading: Practical Use
items.description: Learners apply the pattern to explain a concrete real-world outcome.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Items must use the current v2 smart-layout item shape: heading and description.
Each primary item description must be 12-15 words.
The generated block must contain exactly the item count requested by the v2 prompt.
Current timeline BlockSpec profiles support 4 items for vertical_short or 5-6 items for vertical_long.
Do not add fields that the v2 prompt does not request.
